candidate.completion: leave your read receipts on so I can feel seen.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please leave your read receipts on so I can feel seen.

evaluation.rationale: The line has a clear modern pivot in "seen," tying emotional validation to a platform mechanic, but it extends the loneliness setup more than it sharply overturns it. The closing phrase is exact and recognizable, though the route there is a bit wordy and the full sentence lands as more pointed than truly quotable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
